zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Langton於1285年出生在英國藍卡爾沃爾頓勒-達爾時，他的父親Robert Langton29歲，母親Margaret FitzSimons24歲。他於1305年與Alice de Banastre結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年在英國萊希斯特斯爾邱奇 蘭頓享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Langton于1285年出生在英国藍卡爾沃爾頓勒-達爾时，他的父亲Robert Langton29岁，母亲Margaret FitzSimons24岁。他于1305年与Alice de Banastre结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1333年在英国萊希斯特斯爾邱奇 蘭頓享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Langton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Langton Hall in Kirkby in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), Langton Lodge in Hendon (Middlesex), Langton (Yorkshire), East and West Langton (Leicestershire), Langton by Horncastle, Langton by Spilsby, and Langton by Wragby (all in Lincolnshire), and Lanton (Northumb). Compare Lankton , Lanton , and Longton .

variants.name: Lankton
meanings: History: Thomas Lankton, born c. 1714 in Hartford County, CT, died 1783 in Litchfield County, CT, was a son of Joseph Langton.

variants.name: Longton
meanings: habitational name from Longton in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Langton was born in 1285, in Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England, his father, Robert Langton, was 29 and his mother, Margaret FitzSimons, was 24. He married Alice de Banastre in 1305. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1333, in Church Langton, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Langton est né en 1285, à Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Langton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret FitzSimons, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Banastre en 1305. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1333, à Church Langton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Langton 1285 in Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Langton 29 und seine Mutter Margaret FitzSimons 24. Er hat 1305 Alice de Banastre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1333 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Church Langton, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Langton è nato il nel 1285 nel Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Robert Langton, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margaret FitzSimons, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Banastre nel 1305. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1333, nel Church Langton, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Langtonが1285年にイギリスランカシュアイアワルトン-レ-ダルで生まれた時，父Robert Langtonは29歳，母Margaret FitzSimonsは24歳であった。1305年にAlice de Banastreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1333年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアチャーチ ラントンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Langton(이)가 1285년 영국 랭카실르 월토-레-데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Langton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret FitzSimons(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1305년 Alice de Banastre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 영국 레이스스터실르 c후르치 랭턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Langton nasceu em 1285, em Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Langton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret FitzSimons, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Banastre em 1305. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1333, em Church Langton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Langton родился в 1285 г. в местности валтон-ле-деил, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Langton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret FitzSimons, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Banastre в 1305 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1333 г. в местности чурч лангтон, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.
